revision.text:
<noinclude>{| class="wikitable"
|-
|</noinclude>data-sort-value="{{{sort|}}}" style="{{{style|vertical-align:middle; text-align:center; background-color:var(--background-color-base); color: inherit}}}" class="{{{class|table-na}}}" | ''{{{1|Vac­ant}}}''<noinclude>
|}
{{documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{| class="wikitable" |- |</noinclude>data-sort-value="{{{sort|}}}" style="{{{style|vertical-align:middle; text-align:center; background-color:var(--background-color-base); color: inherit}}}" class="{{{class|table-na}}}" | ''{{{1|Vac­ant}}}''<noinclude> |} {{documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<noinclude>{| class="wikitable"
|-
|</noinclude>data-sort-value="{{{sort|}}}" style="{{{style|vertical-align:middle; text-align:center; background-color:var(--background-color-base); color: inherit}}}" class="{{{class|table-na}}}" | ''{{{1|Vac­ant}}}''<noinclude>

</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: <noinclude>{| class="wikitable" |- |</noinclude>data-sort-value="{{{sort|}}}" style="{{{style|vertical-align:middle; text-align:center; background-color:var(--background-color-base); color: inherit}}}" class="{{{class|table-na}}}" | ''{{{1|Vac­ant}}}''<noinclude> |} {{documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}} </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23692667944|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{| class="wikitable" |- |</noinclude>data-sort-value="{{{sort|}}}" style="{{{style|vertical-align:middle; text-align:center; background-color:var(--background-color-base); color: inherit}}}" class="{{{class|table-na}}}" | ''{{{1|Vac­ant}}}''<noinclude> |} {{documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}} </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<noinclude>{| class="wikitable" |- |</noinclude>data-sort-value="{{{sort|}}}" style="{{{style|vertical-align:middle; text-align:center; background-color:var(--background-color-base); color: inherit}}}" class="{{{class|table-na}}}" | ''{{{1|Vac­ant}}}''<noinclude> |} {{documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}}
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
